full_text:
Bi Lan 畢嵐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bi Lan (畢嵐). One of the 12 Regular Attendants who was known for his engineering achievements. Bi Lan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Bi Lan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
